model_version_if_known: provider-managed model ID gpt-5.4-mini; exact provider-side dated revision unavailable before execution
pricing_reference: OpenAI API documentation accessed 2026-07-02 listed gpt-5.4-mini at $0.75/input MTok and $4.50/output MTok; verify immediately before execution.
provider_version_limitation_note: Provider-side model weights, safety layers, and service configuration may change and cannot be fully reconstructed from the frozen local materials alone.
rate_limit_policy: Pause and retry only after rate-limit reset as a technical failure with a new run identifier; do not alter prompt or source packet.
retry_policy: No retry except technical failure: no response, provider failure, connection failure, or zero output bytes. Retry receives a new run identifier.
run_isolation_requirement: Every model run uses a fresh stateless session. No prior case, condition output, human record, or cross-run summary is visible.
seed_policy: No seed is frozen unless the execution API exposes a supported seed parameter at run time; unsupported seed is recorded as unavailable.
system_prompt_status: frozen local system_prompt.txt; provider-side system configuration unavailable
technical_failure_definition: No response returned, connection failure, provider execution failure, or no output bytes produced.
